name: Kare-Kare
recipeIngredient: 2-3 lbs. fresh oxtail, cut up or 4 pieces pork hocks
1 small eggplant, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the meat in 5 cups water and 2 tsp salt until tender (1 hour).
2. In a large skillet, sauté garlic and onion in hot oil until brown.
3. Spoon out the meat from the liquid and add to the garlic onion mixture.
4. Sauté for another 3 minutes with bagoong.
5. Add the meat/onion/bagoong mixture back to the stewing water.
6. Simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Add eggplant and green beans, then cook until tender.
8. Reduce heat and stir in peanut butter. Mix well and simmer for 5 more minutes.
9. Serve with white rice and extra bagoong. Makes 4 servings.
